title: Produce ≥25 plain-language source descriptions from partner facts
context: After partner object records are ingested (ingest-001), the project must produce the actual plain-language descriptions that the partner museum will display. M2's definition of done requires ≥25 objects with reviewed source descriptions. Every description must be written strictly from sourced facts in the object.yaml, must meet the plain-language reading-level target, must be neutral on any contested point, and must pass domain-aware reviewer sign-off before it may proceed to translation. The 'never invent an object' constraint is absolute.
objective: For each eligible ingested partner object, draft a label-sized (≈40-120 word) plain-language source description written strictly from the sourced facts in the object.yaml: every factual claim maps to a sourceRef; the description meets the configured readability target per guide-001 (or carries reviewer attestation); proper nouns, dates, materials, and period terms are preserved; the description is neutral on any contested point per guide-002. Capture all agent UNCERTAIN flags in review.yaml. Obtain domain-aware reviewer sign-off for each description.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥25 plain-language source descriptions produced, one per eligible ingested partner object
Each description is written strictly from sourced facts: every factual claim maps to a sourceRef in the object.yaml; no invented or unverified content

Each description is label-sized (≈40-120 words), meets the plain-language reading-level target per guide-001 (or carries reviewer plain-language attestation), and preserves all proper nouns, dates, materials, and period terms
Each description is neutral on contested points per guide-002; any contested claim is noted with attribution or omitted; sensitivity/contestation triage confirmed for each object
All agent UNCERTAIN flags captured in review.yaml as agentFlags before review; no sign-off recorded while any flag is unresolved; unresolved grounding flags result in claim removal

Domain-aware reviewer sign-off recorded in the PR for each description (reviewer independent of drafting, COI declared); per-object license, attribution/credit line, and provenance present and verified
resources: multilingual-museum-labels-ingest-001 (partner object records — must be complete)
multilingual-museum-labels-tooling-001 (readability + grounding check scripts — must be green)
output: objects/<objectId>/descriptions/<src-lang>.md for ≥25 partner objects; objects/<objectId>/review.yaml; objects/<objectId>/attribution.txt; objects/<objectId>/provenance.yaml
